name: sentinel-spark-liquidation-shield
description: Automated liquidation protection for Spark lending positions on 0G Galileo. Monitors health factor and triggers repayment or collateral addition when the position approaches the liquidation threshold.

trigger.description: Polls Spark protocol health factor at regular intervals

conditions.description: Position health factor has dropped below the safe threshold

actions.description: Repay a portion of the debt to bring the health factor back above the safe threshold

fallback.description: If repayment is not possible, add additional collateral to reduce liquidation risk
